heading: Interface Endpoints
body:
To return the Google Cloud private endpoint interface that you specify. using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas privateEndpoints gcp interfaces describe <id> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas privateEndpoints gcp interfaces describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-privateEndpoints-gcp-interfaces-describe).**Ui:**Atlas UIClick Dedicated Cluster for a private endpoint
for your dedicated Atlas cluster. (default)
